title: Senior Teacher - NIT Warangal - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - NIT Warangal - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIT Warangal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About NIT Warangal:
NIT Warangal is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Warangal!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
